name: 3.5" Handled Planter Blue - Threshold™
description:
Liven up the decor of any space with this Handled Planter from Threshold™. The stoneware planter features a round shape in blue color with side handles for a stunning look. Great for displaying real or faux plants indoors or outdoors, you can place it solo or with other planters.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
